name: Quercetin
notes: Widely reported flavonol aglycone in both leaf extracts

name: Kaempferol
notes: Reported in moringa leaf polyphenol profiles

name: Luteolin
notes: Reported bioactive flavone from V. amygdalina flowers/leaves

name: Chlorogenic_acid
notes: Major phenolic acid in both species

name: Gallic_acid
notes: Reported in P. biglobosa bark/leaf extracts (tannin precursor)

name: Catechin
notes: Reported tannin/flavonoid monomer in Parkia extracts

name: Epicatechin
notes: Stereoisomer of catechin; reported in Parkia bark

name: Beta-sitosterol
notes: Common plant sterol reported in both species

name: Lupeol
notes: Pentacyclic triterpenoid consistent with terpenoid-positive phytochemical test

name: Benzylamine_moringine
notes: Simplified representative of moringa alkaloid fraction (moringine)

name: Ascorbic_acid
notes: Included as the antioxidant reference used in the growth-rate assays
